name: Natanael Cano
description: '''Nathanahel Rubén''' "'''Natanael'''" '''Cano Monge''' (born 27 March 2001) is a Mexican rapper and singer. He is known for his fusion of [[trap music]] and [[regional Mexican music|regional Mexican]] [[corridos]], known as ''[[corridos tumbados]]''. The idea to fuse the two genres was proposed by Dan Sanchez who wrote Cano's first corrido tumbado, "Soy el Diablo".
